title: Markets Soar Ahead on Powell Rate-Hike Comments

title: Zuckerberg: Social Media Is Meta's Primary Focus
text: The company that rebranded from Facebook to Meta is still focused on social media.  So said Meta Founder, Chairman and CEO Mark Zuckerberg, who added that he wanted to correct the perception that the company is primarily devoted to building the metaverse, The New York Times reported Wednesday (Nov. 30).
